caption: A person wearing purple headphones is seen from the side, interacting with a white tablet placed on a bright green surface. The person's hand is visible as they tap and swipe across the tablet's screen, which displays various application icons. In the background, a white keyboard and a computer monitor are partially visible. Throughout the sequence, subtitles appear at the bottom of the screen. Initially, the text reads, "Because I work a lot and I am proud of it." As the person continues to navigate the tablet's interface, the screen changes to a red-themed menu featuring the word "* CRÉER". The subtitles then shift to read, "I give it my best as long as the conditions are right to do so". The camera remains in a close-up, side-profile position as the person's hand moves across the screen to select different options.
